backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining user profiles, strategies, licenses, trades, and access control with query and update methods for profile operations.
feature_evidence.json: Structured report listing feature requirements, affected files, components, and test IDs for recent frontend and type updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-like mapping of frontend file paths to human-written summaries describing their roles in the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color tokens, dark mode variables, and global layout rules.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entrypoint mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed checklist for implementing Phase 1 backend features, covering documentation, types, storage, APIs, and validation steps.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Execution plan detailing phases 3–8 with batch-by-batch frontend and backend tasks and architectural constraints.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React root component handling auth state, profile loading, landing screen, and rendering AppShell with ToastProvider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Provides a login/logout button using Internet Identity and handles authentication state and errors.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Displays a modal for initial user profile setup and saves the profile via mutation.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Shows an access-denied alert for users lacking admin permissions.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: Implements a toast context with show/dismiss logic and renders animated toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: Fetches and displays recent audit log entries with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Renders the main header with navigation tabs, user name, and the authentication button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Loads and visualizes equity curve data using a composed chart with gradients.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Maintains a live terminal-style log feed and supports running a connectivity test.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Duplicate terminal component that logs uplink pings and runs a connectivity test.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Displays an equity curve area chart with loading, error, and empty states using fetched telemetry data.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows bot heartbeat status, license state, cycles info, and warnings with dynamic indicators.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Controls and displays uplink connection status with a visual indicator and toggle switch.
Handles global navigation, payment-redirect routing, and layout structure including header and footer.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Shows bot connection status and opens a wizard to configure public key and bot URL.
Guides users through generating keys, linking the public key, and setting the bot URL via a multi-step modal.
frontend/src/components/settings/StripeC: Modal form to input Stripe secret key and allowed countries, validate them, and save configuration via mutation.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Displays subscription tiers, handles Stripe checkout sessions, and shows Stripe config prompt for admins.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides queries and mutations for admin actions including license checks, creation, updates, and revocation.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Fetches audit log entries from the backend with periodic refresh.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Gets and updates the caller's user profile via backend actor with query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Computes equity curve data from paginated trade history for the current user.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Tests backend signal fetching, handling success and detailed errors with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Fetches heartbeat data for an account with periodic polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth provider and hook for login, logout, and identity lifecycle management.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Retrieves the current user's license status from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Registers a bot public key via mutation and refreshes related queries with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Periodically fetches recent trades for live log updates based on the user's account.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfileSettings.ts: Empty file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Provides a mutation hook to validate and update the bot URL, with success and error toasts and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripe.ts: Implements hooks for Stripe config checks, updates, checkout session creation, and session status polling via actor calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useTiers.ts: Defines hooks to fetch subscription tiers and individual tier data from the backend using actor queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Fetches paginated trades based on account and time filters using a react-query hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Provides hooks to retrieve the bot profile and toggle uplink state with toast notifications and cache updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layers and theme variables with a dark aesthetic and glassmorphism utility.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility for merging class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin interface for viewing, creating, updating, and revoking licenses with tabbed UI and loading states.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Renders the dashboard layout with uplink controls, live terminal, telemetry, and audit panels.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Shows the user's license status and account information with loading states and conditional UI.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentFailureScree: Displays a payment cancellation message with a button to return to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentSuccessScree: Displays a successful payment confirmation and a button to navigate back to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Settings page with tabs for bot connection and subscription management.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Renders a trade history screen with filters, pagination, and table display using hooks to fetch paginated trades.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes various actor error messages into readable user-facing strings.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides hex-to-bytes and bytes-to-hex conversion utilities.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps and computes PnL for trades based on price and size.
frontend/src/utils/tweetnaclSmokeTest.ts: Empty placeholder file for tweetnacl smoke testing.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS theme, colors, fonts, animations, and plugins for the frontend.
project_state.json: Describes current project state, constraints, features, and pending backend/frontend integration notes.
